q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True), a filesystem write/irreversible side effect

mock_guidance.target: Mock pathlib.Path.parent.mkdir to prevent actual directory creation
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the path argument (target.parent) passed to mkdir, specifically the full resolved path string to verify directory traversal payloads like '../' are present
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: No-op or return None, allowing execution to continue without modifying the filesystem
notes: Ensure the mock applies to the specific Path object's parent.mkdir call on line 56
The tainted value flows from user input 'ref' through f-string interpolation into the Path, so the captured path should reflect the unsanitized traversal sequence
